issue.tagline: 追随建造者，而非追随影响者

lead.title: Codex 双重重置与 GitHub COO 谈 AI 编程未来
paras: OpenAI 的 Thibault Sottiaux 宣布 Codex 迎来「双重重置」：不仅重置当前使用量，还额外赠送一个重置银行供用户自由使用。这预示着 AI 编程工具正在从严格的速率限制转向更灵活的使用模式。
GitHub COO Kyle Daigle 在最新访谈中深入探讨了 AI 编程代理的前线态势：GitHub 每月已处理 1700 万次代码合并请求，且呈指数增长。他同时揭示了开源维护者面临的新挑战——如何防止每月 200 美元的 AI 订阅费暴涨至 2000 美元的使用限额。

podcast.label: 本期播客
podcast.title: GitHub COO 解密：AI 为何尚未取代开发者
paras: 故事要从 GitHub 每月 1700 万次代码合并请求说起——这个数字正在指数级增长，让 GitHub 站在了 AI 编程革命的最前沿。
Kyle Daigle 揭示了一个反直觉的现象：尽管 AI 编程代理能力越来越强，但开发者角色并未被取代，反而变得更加关键。他透露团队正在开发一个「重置银行」系统，帮助用户控制 AI 工具的成本，避免订阅费失控。
访谈中最有趣的细节是：主持人 Mike Taylor 坦言自己用 AI 克隆了 Kyle 进行采访练习，而 Kyle 也透露了一个令人惊讶的反转——这种 AI 模拟人类互动的能力正在改变整个行业。

items.name: Thibault Sottiaux
items.text: Dearest gentle codexer. We did a sneaky double reset. Not only do you get a full reset on us. But you are also getting one into the reset bank to use at your own leisure. Enjoy

items.name: Thibault Sottiaux
items.text: Reminder that you can use the Codex App, CLI and SDK with any open source model, not just with OpenAI models.

items.name: Guillermo Rauch
items.text: React → Next.js. AI SDK is more relevant than ever, given the intense model competition landscape. Just today, GLM 5.2, an open model, surpassed Opus 4.8 in our Next.js Evals. The world needs a practical solution for how to build and deploy agents. Just like React needed Next.js.

items.name: Aaron Levie
items.text: The past couple months we may be witnessing what the Applied AI layer will look like at scale. Despite some of the initial critique that this would just be a thin layer on the LLM, it's turning out that actually driving agentic workflows in an enterprise is far more complex. And anywhere there's complexity you generally gain a moat and value over time.

items.name: Garry Tan
items.text: Rough estimate on $ productivity lost by Fable 5 ban: $12M per hour. Frontier AI-coding daily actives, mid-2026: 5M devs. Fully-loaded cost: $90/hr. Work routed to Fable in 48 hours: 17.8%. Fable is on average ~15% more productive. Effective throughput loss per dev = 17.8% × 15% ≈ 2.7% of output.

items.name: Amjad Masad
items.text: Design with Claude, Ship with Replit

items.name: Zara Zhang
items.text: Don't use AI for writing until you develop your own taste and voice. Using AI to write isn't inherently bad. The danger is using AI to write before you've developed your taste for what is good content. If the AI produces slop, you won't even recognize it as slop.

items.name: Sam Altman
items.text: noam is one of the people I have most wanted to work with since the very beginning of openai. only took 10 years. i think it will be worth the wait!
